Ranveer Versatile Singh 🔥🔥 Ranveer Singh has always been a brilliant and versatile actor, whether it’s 83, Padmaavat, GB, Bajirao Mastani or many others. In each film, he has shown a different side of himself and proved his range again and again.

With Dhurandhar 2, he has taken that level even at more top. His performance feels very natural on screen, and the way he carries the character shows his strong range on acting.

Ranveer truly stands among the finest actors of this generation.
